typography: handwritten script headers with clean body
decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hero_layout: centered — everything stacked in the middle
hero_headline_scale: large — noticeably big, makes a statement
nav_style: minimal floating — small pill in corner
card_style: minimal — no cards, just separated content blocks
scroll_animation: minimal — subtle fade-up on sections (CSS only, short delay)
hover_effects: expressive — tilt, glow, border animations, underline slides
contact_style: playful — with a friendly CTA headline
footer_style: playful — with an emoji or easter egg
spacing_density: tight — compact, lots of content visible
quirk: navigation is vertical on the left side, not top
